raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tee irr dohti/ tee irr
man dohti no Israëta Behrnu
Widdus/ Es efinu fewim tohs
nehmis winno Weetâ/ kas to
Mahti atplech/ ikkatra Pirm-
dsiunta (Weetâ) no teem Israë-
ta Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo wiſſi Israëta Behrnu
Pirmdsimmuschi peederr man/
starp Zilwekeein/ un starp Loh-
peen/ tai Deenâ/ kad es wiſſus
Pirmdsïmuschus Egiptes-Sem-
mê nosittu/ efmu Es tohs few
fwehtijis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un efmu tohs Lewitus
nehmis wiſſu Pirmdsimmuschu
Weetâ/ no teem Israëta Behr-
neem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es efmu tohs Lewitus
Aäronain/ un winna Dehleem
par weenu Dahwanu dewis no
teem Israëta Behrneem/ ka teem
Israëta Behrnu Darbôs jadar-
bojahs eekſch tahs Sa-eeschanas
Telts/ un ka teem pahr Israëta
Behrneem Salihdsinafchana ja-
darra/ ka nekahda Mohziba starp
Israëta Behrneem nahk/ ja Isra-
etä Behrni paſchi pee fwehtas
Weetas pee-eetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad darrija Mohsus/ un
Aärons/ un wiſſa Israëta Behr-
nu Draudse/ pehz wiſſu/ ko tas
KUNGS Mohsium par teem Le-
witeein pawehlejis bija/ ta dar-
rija tee Israëta Behrnt pee win-
neem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Lewitiſchſthſtijahs/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "un masgaja fatwas Drehbes/ u
Aärongs pahrzillaaja tohs par Ku-
stinaschanas- Uppuri preekſch t
KUNGS/ un Aärongs darrija
pahr teemSalihdsinaschanu win
aus fcheihſtidams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pehz to nahze tee Le-
witi/ ka tee eekſch Sa-eeschana
Telts Darbein darbotohs
preekſch Aärona/ un preekſch win
na Dehleem/ ittin ka tas Kung
Mohsium no teem Lewiteem bij
pawehlejis/ ta darrija tee pe-
winneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS runna
ia us Mohsu/ un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas irr tas/ tas teem Le-
witeem peenahfahs/ kas diwide-
mits un peez Gaddus wezzi u-
pahri irr/ tee warr nahkt Kalpo-
schanas Ammata stahweht/ Sa-
eetchanas Telți.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet kursch peezdefini-
Gaddus wezz irr/ tam buhs n-
ta Ammata schahs Kalpoſchana-
atſtahtees/ un ne buhs wai-
kalpoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Toinehr tam buhs f-
weein Brahteem Sa-eeschana-
Telți pee Rohkas buht/ un u-
rauds iht/ bet pascha Kalpoſcha-
nâ taim ne buhs kalpoht. Ta bu-
jums pee teem Lewiteem darrih-
winnu fargajama Ammata.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
